title: I built a very profitable algo
author: Routine_Storage2002
selftext: Hi guys I just wanted to share the algo I made last year, I wanted to know if some people wanted me to share it with them if so ill provide more details in dms or if you have any questions ill answer here

comments.author: AltruisticKoalaa
comments.body: What does indicators does it use to trade? And what ai model are you using?

replies.author: Routine_Storage2002
replies.body: It only use a trending indicator and i used chatgpt to code it after that i tested it and built more filter with the data i had

replies.author: AltruisticKoalaa
replies.body: Wow okay, I used chat gtp to do the same but I had no coding experience and found whenever I wanted to add a new feature the ai would just re write all the code differently after a certain amount of prompts, was that a issue for you? Also what algo is the bot trading off?

replies.author: Routine_Storage2002
replies.body: To Make sure it doesnt do that you have to send it the code and told him to edit it also make sure to correct chatgpt code by telling him were there is error in the code using the metaeditor if you are using mt5

replies.author: AltruisticKoalaa
replies.body: Right that makes sense, Is the image above a backtest or live testing?

comments.author: Efficient-Try-299
comments.body: I’d love u to share it

replies.author: Efficient-Try-299
replies.body: Yeah I know like 98% of every post here are scammers just fun to waste their time

comments.author: tnahser
comments.body: I’d love to test out your algo, did you want to test mine?

comments.author: Downinthedumps1001
comments.body: I really doubt this because chat gpt can’t even get simple math answers right
